_comment: Live build state. Primary writes on every state transition. For full narrative context see STATE.md.

2_2_classify_book_skill.notes: claude -p invocation pattern pinned at build/pins/claude-code.md: --system-prompt-file SKILL.md --model haiku.

2_4_library_watcher.notes: 98 supported files on real library scan. Calibre 9.7.0 installed.

2_7_book_note_skills.notes: argument/narrative/poetry templates; preamble guard 'first character must be #'.

4_1_regen_profile_skill.notes: Directive-boundary principle established: command-like inbox content must not auto-promote to [directive]; promotion only via correct().

4_2_profile_regen_handler.notes: Monthly launchd cron. _invoke_skill testing seam. Corpus sampler covers kindle + kindle_highlight.

4_3_correct_tool.notes: Atomic writes. Profile + book targets initially; judge_serendipity target added in 4.3+ extension.

4_3_plus_correct_judge_extension.notes: correct() target_type='judge_serendipity' lets users tune ambient surfacing in-chat.

4_4_judge_serendipity_skill.notes: strip_code_fences tolerance helper — Haiku wraps JSON in code fences inconsistently.

4_5_surface_tool.notes: Two-pass filter. Reuses judge's strip_code_fences helper.

4_6_custom_instructions.notes: User to refine in claude.ai chat. Only useful once claude.ai can reach the server — see Phase 6.

5a_audiobookshelf_handler.notes: mutagen==1.47.0. Migration 0004 adds audiobook_path + narrator. Jaccard 0.70 fuzzy merge against storygraph_entry. 335 jobs enqueued 12:30, sit behind library drain (FIFO).

5b_movies_tv_tmdb.notes: parse-torrent-title==2.8.2. Migration 0005 adds media_type, release_year, season_count, director, genres, plot, tmdb_id, filesystem_path. Dry-run: 374 movies + 61 TV = 435 items, 0 unparseable. TMDB key resolved — present in login keychain (service 'commonplace-tmdb-api-key', account 'tmdb'). 435 jobs queued behind library drain + audiobooks + enrichment (FIFO).

5c_book_enrichment.notes: No API keys required. Migration 0006 adds description, subjects, first_published_year, isbn, enrichment_source, enriched_at. Google Books cached at ~/.cache/commonplace/google_books/. 670 jobs queued behind library drain + audiobooks (FIFO).

5_scanners_launchd.notes: All three daily-at-04:xx, idempotent skip-if-ingested, clean exit when drive unmounted. All three visible in `launchctl list`; next firings tomorrow 04:00/04:15/04:30.

6_a_mcp_json.notes: Project-scope config at repo root: commonplace -> http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp (type=http). CLI needs restart from repo root to load; approval prompt fires once.

6_launchd_mcp_server.notes: Uses .venv/bin/python -m commonplace_server. KeepAlive + RunAtLoad. Env: COMMONPLACE_DB_PATH, COMMONPLACE_HOST=127.0.0.1, COMMONPLACE_PORT=8765. Logs at ~/Library/Logs/commonplace-mcp-server.{out,err}.log. Verified healthy post-load (healthcheck 200).

6_c_funnel_claude_ai.notes: Auth landed via 6_auth (URL-path secret). Plan: tailscale funnel --bg --https=8443 http://127.0.0.1:8765 -> https://plex-server.tailb9faa9.ts.net:8443/mcp/<token>/. Paste full token-suffixed URL into claude.ai custom-connector config (Max/Team tier). Port 443 taken by Plex/audiobookshelf Funnel (-> 127.0.0.1:13378) — do not disturb. Ports 8443 and 10000 free.

6_auth.notes: URL-path secret chosen because claude.ai's custom-connector UI only supports OAuth 2.1 or bare URL — no custom headers. OAuth shim overkill for single-user system. FastMCP 2.13.1's mcp.run(path=...) parameter handles dynamic mount paths natively. Token resolution order: env var COMMONPLACE_MCP_TOKEN -> keychain. Mirrors TMDB keychain pattern (works under launchd context). User must restart Claude Code CLI from repo root after this commit to pick up new .mcp.json URL.

embedding_progress_tool.notes: In-progress from prior session, cleaned up + committed during Phase 7 preflight. Pure logic decoupled from FastMCP; thin wrapper in server.py registers MCP tool. Answers drain-visibility questions (by_status, in_flight jobs with running_for_seconds, recently_completed, recent_throughput).

lit_plan.notes: Draft 1 of the liturgical-ingest technical plan. All §6 open questions resolved (Q6 Byzantine calendar deferred with Jordanville). Pilot is Anglican-only (BCP 1979 + LFF 2022). Sidecar-table schema over shared documents. One-document-per-liturgical-unit to survive chunker merge floor. Composed-embedding strategy (option Y) for short units.

lit_0_1_migration.notes: Three sidecar tables + 8 indexes per plan §2.1. CASCADE delete from documents, self-referential FK on feast.cross_tradition_equivalent_id. PRAGMA integrity_check ok. schema_version bumps to 7.

lit_0_2_validator.notes: Pydantic v2 models (SubjectDef, TheologicalSubjectsFile, FeastEntry). validate_feasts() collects all errors before raising FeastValidationError. Controlled vocabulary with _other: escape hatch per plan §6 Q5. Format-only date_rule regex (accepts '13-01' — calendar semantics out of scope for validator).

lit_0_3_import_cli.notes: Two-pass idempotent upsert keyed on (primary_name, tradition). First pass inserts rows + builds slug→id map; second pass resolves cross_tradition_equivalent. Flags: --dry-run, --db, --ignore-missing-cross-refs, --feasts, --subjects. Follow-up: a UNIQUE index on feast(primary_name, tradition) would speed upserts at scale — surfaced but out of scope for pilot.

lit_0_4_calendar_stub.notes: movable_feasts_for_year via dateutil.easter (EASTER_WESTERN/EASTER_ORTHODOX switch). resolve_fixed_date + resolve_movable_date + resolve (union). LFF 2022 precedence ladder deferred to Phase 4 task 4.5 per plan §2.5. Two targeted type: ignore comments where dateutil stubs don't narrow EASTER_WESTERN to the expected Literal.

lit_0_5_subject_frequency_tool.notes: Follows embedding_progress pattern: pure logic in module, thin wrapper in server.py. Tool registered as 'subject_frequency' (required rename from agent's default 'subject_frequency_tool' to match plan §2.6). Malformed feast.theological_subjects JSON skipped with warning — read-only audit tool, permissive.

lit_0_7_feasts_yaml.notes: 398 feasts seeded — exceeds plan target of ≥200. Imported via `make seed-feasts`. ~38 LFF-specific figures still missing + ~42 principal feasts seeded under source ≠ lff_2024 — captured as follow-up under phase_1_open_followups.

lit_0_8_tests.notes: Unit tests rolled in with each task: 15 + 29 + 27 + 29 + 11 = 111 new tests total; 954/954 suite green.

lit_1_1_bcp_crawler.notes: Polite: 180s crawl-delay, self-identifying User-Agent, host-scoped to www.bcponline.org. Resumable: skip-if-cached. Atomic writes (tmp + fsync + rename). 429 bails non-zero; other 4xx/5xx logged+skipped. URL→path mapping: host-prefixed, percent-decoded, sanitized; query strings hashed to 8-char SHA-256 suffix; cache-dir containment verified. Tests use httpx.MockTransport (no network). Live-site discovery on launch: bcponline.org is a frameset site — landing page has zero <a> tags. Patched post-launch (commit fc88e5e) to also follow <frame>/<iframe> src; re-launch drained nav.html successfully. Expected wall-clock: 8–13hr for ~150–250 pages.

lit_1_8_embed_text_override.notes: Keyword-only param embed_text_override: Callable[[Chunk], str] | None = None on embed_document. Default (None) path is byte-identical to before — regression guard test asserts embedder receives [c.text for c in chunks] verbatim. Override path feeds composed strings to embedder while chunks.text stays raw. Idempotency preserved; override exceptions propagate. No existing call sites updated (optional param). Used by liturgical handler later for composed-string embeddings per plan §2.7 option Y.

lit_1_2_bcp_collects_parser.notes: Rite I + Rite II collects; seasonal + proper. Slug realignment in 9ef1505 switches to canonical {name_snake}_anglican via _make_slug in scripts/feast_import.py.

lit_1_3_bcp_daily_office_parser.notes: 151 units across MP/EP Rite I+II, Compline, Noonday, Daily Devotions, canticles, Great Litany. Kind taxonomy: canticle | prayer | creed | psalm_ref | seasonal_sentence | versicle_response | rubric_block | intro | suffrage.

lit_1_4_bcp_psalter_parser.notes: 150 psalms, 2505 verses, Psalm 119 → 176 verses + 22 subheadings. lxml recovery mode for malformed source. Source-data bugs handled: Psalm 64 malformed id quoting, Psalm 138 wrong id — psnum span text is authoritative.

lit_1_5_bcp_proper_liturgies_parser.notes: 227 units across Ash Wed + Palm Sun + Maundy Thu + Good Fri + Holy Sat + Easter Vigil. Three speaker-table variants unified via shared cell-class frozenset. Inline-styled optional blocks detected via border-left style attribute (not CSS class). Good Friday page-break split preserved source-faithfully.

lit_1_6_bcp_prayers_and_thanksgivings_pa.notes: 70 prayers + 11 thanksgivings = 81 units. Uniform slug {name_snake}_{prayer|thanksgiving}_{N}_anglican disambiguates duplicate-title pairs (50/51 'For a Birthday', 57/58 'For Guidance'). Thanksgiving 1 '(1979 Version)' source-HTML prefix stripped at parser.

lit_1_7_lff_2024_parser.notes: PULLED FORWARD from Phase 2 per user direction. PyMuPDF font/size state machine. Font signature for LFF 2024 (differs from plan's 2022 assumption of Sabon-Bold 17pt): SabonLTStd-Bold 17pt → entry name; SabonLTStd 11pt → collect body + rite labels; SabonLTStd 9pt → bio prose. Handles bracketed trial-use entries + wrapped-span names + cross-page continuations. Two Christmas alternate propers preserved structurally.

lit_1_10_bcp_handler.notes: RENUMBERED from plan's 1.7 because LFF parser took the 1.7 slot. One ingest_liturgy_bcp job ingests all 5 BCP parsers: 704 rows after cross-file dedup (275 collects + 118 daily-office + 3 psalter-sample + 227 proper-liturgies + 81 P&T). Meta normalisation: category derives from parser (liturgical_proper / devotional_manual / psalter); genre verbatim from parser kind/genre; tradition=anglican source=bcp_1979; author=null (BCP is communally compiled). Idempotent via (content_type, source_id) UNIQUE index. Payload supports source_root, parsers filter, dry_run.

lit_1_11_lff_handler.notes: PULLED FORWARD from plan's 2.4. One ingest_liturgy_lff job → 201 bios + 564 collects (566 − 2 shared-text dedupes via documents.content_hash UNIQUE; e.g., Visitation BVM + Nativity BVM share collect text — intentional). SHA256 guard on fixture PDF. embed_text_override composes 'Collect for {name} (Anglican, Rite I/II).\n\n{text}' per plan §2.7 option Y; bios embed raw prose. Feast lookup misses: ~38 LFF figures absent from feasts.yaml + ~42 principal feasts seeded under source ≠ lff_2024. Bios without feast match are skipped (commemoration_bio.feast_id NOT NULL); collects still insert with calendar_anchor_id=null.

lit_1_9_bcp_integration_test.notes: Full pipeline: INSERT queued ingest_liturgy_bcp job → poll_once(conn, HANDLERS) → documents + liturgical_unit_meta + embeddings populate → search_commonplace(content_type='liturgical_unit', source='bcp1979', limit=3) returns 3 liturgical_unit rows with bcp1979:// URIs + non-empty chunk_text. Count asserted against fixture total (704) not DoD's ≈600±5% (fixtures ship 3 psalter samples vs. production's 150). Search results: 3 P&T prayers (After Receiving Communion, After Worship, On Sunday). Source-filter note: search_commonplace's `source` param is LIKE on source_uri (bcp1979://), not liturgical_unit_meta.source (bcp_1979) — documented in test docstring. Second test pins idempotency: re-submit same source → COUNT stays 704 via (content_type, source_id) UNIQUE. Fixture patches both COMMONPLACE_DB_PATH env var AND commonplace_db.db.DB_PATH module constant (worker wrapper calls connect() with no args → resolves import-cached constant, not env var). Monkeypatches commonplace_server.embedding.embed to return zero-vectors — covers both ingest pipeline + search-query embedding, no Ollama in CI.

lit_4_1_prose_regression_baseline.notes: Phase 4 task 4.1. Prose regression baseline fixture + tests. 20 synthetic seeds; 16 accept / 182 reject baseline pinned. Offline tests inline; live tests gated behind new `live` pytest marker. Baseline must be frozen before 4.3 SKILL.md prose shifts.

lit_4_2_liturgical_fixtures.notes: Phase 4 task 4.2. Paired-stimulus coverage against prose_regression baseline. §6 Q4 spillover traps: Butler-on-grief, Weil-philosophical, Derrida-on-mercy, light-as-physics, peace-as-diplomatic. Top-level carries plan_ref, pipeline_version_note (baseline f420d8e + SKILL.md 5e06102), categories legend, stats. Follow-ups for 4.7: (a) no companion loader test yet — belongs at replay time; (b) expected_surface.source_id slugs best-effort — 4.7 should assert kind+name loosely until DB slugs confirmed.

lit_4_3_judge_skill_md_edit.notes: Phase 4 task 4.3. Added 'Liturgical candidates' decision-rubric section (4 bullets: proper/devotional acceptance shift on theological-subject match vs. vocabulary; hagiography behaves as prose; no new-angle/counter-move scoring for liturgy; frame field emission rule) + frame field on accepted entries in Output contract (value 'liturgical_ground' for proper/devotional only; omitted for prose + hagiography — no null). 2-item cap shared across prose + liturgy. frame field is additive; parser.py .get() pattern forwards unknown keys untouched — consumed by 4.6 hydration downstream.

lit_4_4_search_liturgical_filters.notes: Phase 4 task 4.4. 5 new search_commonplace kwargs: calendar_year, category, genre, tradition, feast_name. Option A date-range overload on calendar filters.

lit_4_5_lff_precedence_lectionarypage.notes: Phase 4 task 4.5. LFF 2024 precedence rules: precedence_rank column, transfer rules, lectionarypage cross-check 20/20 match. Subsumes Phase 2 task 2.6.

gates.mypy: clean on commonplace_server/surface.py; pre-existing unused-ignore warnings in tests/test_surface.py untouched (lines 209-234, verified present pre-change)

lit_4_6_surface_hydration.notes: Phase 4 task 4.6. surface.py candidate hydration. Added _fetch_liturgical_meta(conn, document_ids) helper: single SELECT on liturgical_unit_meta LEFT JOIN feast, keyed on document_id. Called once per run_surface after the search() pass, scoped to raw_results whose content_type=='liturgical_unit' — no per-candidate round-trip. category, genre, feast_name (from feast.primary_name or None for un-anchored units), tradition attached to candidates_with_meta only when a meta row exists; prose candidates stay slim. Forwarded into the judge's candidate payload and returned on hydrated accepted/triangulation items. 4 new tests: liturgical fields in+out; null feast_name when calendar_anchor_id is NULL; absence on prose candidates; mixed liturgical/prose payload.

gates.mypy: clean on new files; 10 pre-existing errors unchanged in unrelated modules

liturgical_side.root_cause: liturgy_bcp.py never applied embed_text_override (plan §2.7 option Y); liturgy_lff.py did. BCP collects 60-100 token raw chunks lose to prose 300-500 token chunks in KNN top-10. Confirmed: 0 liturgical_unit rows in top-30 for Marian-kenosis seed.

lit_4_7_prose_and_liturgical_review.notes: Phase 4 task 4.7. Primary ratified prose-side ship. Liturgical side deferred to 4.8. seed_06 (love) 120s judge timeout treated as transient — not judgment drift. 5/6 prose flips are defensible (stingy-cap working, triangulation swap on seed_04 is a net win). build/4_7_replay_results.json committed in-repo for future replay baselines; move to .gitignore if it grows.

lit_4_8_bcp_embed_backport_and_reingest.notes: Phase 4 task 4.8. OPENED from 4.7 review. Backport embed_text_override into commonplace_worker/handlers/liturgy_bcp.py mirroring liturgy_lff.py:309 pattern — compose per-category embed strings (collect / daily_office / psalter / proper_liturgy / prayer_thanksgiving) with feast/rite/seasonal context so BCP chunks compete in KNN top-10 against prose. Then: purge existing BCP docs+chunks+embeddings+meta (idempotent handler short-circuits without purge) + reingest; enqueue ingest_liturgy_lff for live library.db (currently 0 rows at source='lff_2024' — lit_pos_04/05/06 block on this); rerun scripts/replay_4_7_review.py and confirm liturgical positives surface. Final Phase 4 gate.

mcp_per_kind_ingest_wrappers.notes: Follow-up split from 4.4 scope creep. Thin per-kind ingest MCP tool wrappers: ingest_article, ingest_youtube, ingest_podcast, ingest_bluesky_url, ingest_image_url.

open_questions: Profile current.md bootstrap — user is seeding on the side; regen handler (4.2) handles both existing-current-md and first-run cases.

blocked.reason: waiting on library drain + Kindle backfill + Bluesky backfill
green-lit by user 2026-04-16 — waiting on library drain to avoid Ollama contention
green-lit by user 2026-04-16 — waiting on library drain to avoid Ollama contention

deferred.notes: app password rotation disregarded per user

decisions_made.summary: hybrid chunker (paragraph->512/64 window), sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table, 768-dim nomic-embed-text

MCP exposure sequence: path A (Claude Code CLI via .mcp.json) first, launchd for persistence, path C (claude.ai via Tailscale Funnel on 8443) gated behind auth. Path B (Claude Desktop) skipped as redundant.

MCP auth design: URL-path secret (not header, not OAuth). Forced by claude.ai's custom-connector UI which only supports OAuth 2.1 or bare URL — no custom-header config. Ruled out Tailscale-only because claude.ai web + iOS reachability is a hard requirement. Ruled out OAuth shim as overkill for single-user system. Funnel's TLS encrypts the path in transit; rotation via make mcp-token-rotate.

LFF pulled forward from Phase 2 into Phase 1. User direction: ingest LFF 2024 (not 2022) alongside BCP. Task renumbering: plan's 1.7 (handler scaffolding) → this session's 1.10; plan's 2.4 (LFF handler) → 1.11; LFF parser took the freed 1.7 slot. Phase 2 effectively absorbed; tasks 2.1/2.2/2.3/2.4/2.5 map onto Phase 1 work. 2.6 lectionarypage cross-check remains as Phase 2 residual.

P&T slug disambiguation: uniform {name_snake}_{prayer|thanksgiving}_{N}_anglican for all 81 records, not just the 4 colliding ones. Uniformity over elegance — downstream code doesn't branch on collision detection.

LFF collect embed strategy: embed_text_override composes 'Collect for {name} (Anglican, Rite I/II).\n\n{text}' for embedding; chunks.text stores raw display text (plan §2.7 option Y). Bios embed raw prose without override.

Accepted duplicate-content collect dedup as feature, not bug. Visitation BVM + Nativity BVM share collect text → second insert silently resolves to first via SELECT-by-hash. documents.content_hash UNIQUE surfaces cross-commemoration overlap intentionally. Two feasts pointing at one collect document is acceptable.
BCP handler author field: null. Rationale: BCP 1979 is communally compiled, not authored. 'The Episcopal Church' would mislead retrieval surfaces as a byline.

recent_completions.gates: 4.7 review pass complete (aa7aee9...). PROSE SIDE CLEARS MODERATE BAR: 6 seeds flipped, 5/6 defensible drift (stingy cap working; seed_04 triangulation swap is a net win), 1/6 (seed_06) is a 120s judge timeout treated as transient. 0/5 spillover traps triggered. 5/5 true-negatives held. LITURGICAL SIDE BLOCKED ON RETRIEVAL: 10/20 (all 10 negatives pass; all 10 positives fail). Root cause identified: liturgy_bcp.py never applied embed_text_override (plan §2.7 option Y) — BCP collects (60-100 token raw) lose to prose chunks (300-500 token) in KNN top-10, so judge never sees liturgical candidates. Confirmed by direct search API probe. Harness shipped: tests/test_liturgical_surfacing_offline.py (18 structural tests), scripts/replay_4_7_review.py (live), build/4_7_replay_results.json. Gates: 1644/1644 suite (-m 'not live'), ruff + mypy clean on new files. Follow-up 4.8 opened: backport embed_text_override into liturgy_bcp.py, reingest BCP, live-ingest LFF (0 rows at source='lff_2024'), rerun replay.

Wave 4B shipped in parallel dispatch (4.2 + 4.3 + 4.6). 4.2: tests/fixtures/liturgical_surfacing.json — 20 cases (10 pos / 5 true-neg / 5 spillover); JSON valid; 1628-test collection clean; ruff clean. 4.3: skills/judge_serendipity/SKILL.md — Liturgical candidates section + `frame` field on accepted entries ('liturgical_ground' value for proper/devotional only); 75/75 judge+prose tests pass; ruff clean. 4.6: surface.py hydration already logged above. 4.7 primary review is the final Phase 4 gate. Forward flags from 4.2 for 4.7: (a) no companion loader test yet — primary may need to write one; (b) expected_surface.source_id slugs best-effort — assert kind+name loosely until DB slugs confirmed.

4 new tests, 1626/1626 suite (-m 'not live'), ruff clean on changed files, mypy clean on commonplace_server/surface.py (pre-existing unused-ignore warnings in tests/test_surface.py untouched). surface.py candidate hydration: category/genre/feast_name/tradition pulled from liturgical_unit_meta (+ feast LEFT JOIN) in a single query per run_surface call, attached only to liturgical_unit candidates; forwarded into judge payload and returned on hydrated items. Service restarted: com.commonplace.mcp-server kickstart → pid 52882, /healthcheck 200 schema_version 9.

4 commits on main: f420d8e (task 4.1 — prose regression baseline fixture + tests; 20 synthetic seeds, 16 accept / 182 reject baseline; offline + live pytest marker) → cfa2317 (task 4.5 — LFF 2024 precedence rules + lectionarypage cross-check; precedence_rank, transfer rules, 40 new tests, 20/20 lectionarypage match) → 66b39f6 (task 4.4 — liturgical search filters + calendar-range overload; 5 new kwargs calendar_year/category/genre/tradition/feast_name, Option A date-range overload, 19 new tests) → c47d901 (MCP thin per-kind ingest tool wrappers: ingest_article, ingest_youtube, ingest_podcast, ingest_bluesky_url, ingest_image_url — follow-up split from 4.4 scope creep). Wave 4B (4.2 + 4.3 + 4.6) + 4.7 review still pending. Task 2.6 lectionarypage cross-check now reducible — 4.5 covers it.

commit 01af6ea — broadened handler predicate (source='lff_2024' → tradition='anglican') + 58 new yaml rows. Hit rate 201/283 = 71.0% → 283/283 = 100.0%. +540/-5 lines across 3 files (handler, test, yaml). New TestBroadenedPredicate class (2 tests) pins the broadened query shape. Full suite 1541 passed. Ruff + mypy clean on changed files. Curly-quote surprise: LFF parser emits U+2018 for Hawai'i entries; yaml uses \u2018 escapes. LFF pull-forward follow-up (listed in STATE.md phase_1_open_followups) now closed.

commit eed6b09 — tests/test_phase1_bcp_integration.py (2 tests, 199 lines). Full suite 1538 passed, ruff clean, mypy clean on new file. Meta count observed: 704 (fixture-determined). Phase 1 DoD per plan §8.7 met.

7 commits pushed: feb15e3 (0.7 seed) → 3021b83 (1.2 Collects) → 9ef1505 (1.2 slug realign) → 4b56d34 (1.3 Daily Office) → c29f8f3 (1.4 Psalter) → 15998a1 (1.5 Proper Liturgies) → 055d55d (1.6 P&T) → 06a867d (1.7 LFF parser) → 8daf8c9 (1.10+1.11 handlers). origin/main now at 8daf8c9.
commit 8daf8c9 — BCP + LFF handlers + worker wiring; 53 new tests; 1531/1531 suite; ruff clean; mypy clean on new code.

3 commits: 15998a1 (1.5 Proper Liturgies, 120 tests) + 055d55d (1.6 P&T, 64 tests) + 06a867d (1.7 LFF parser, 43 tests). +227 tests, 1477/1477 suite. PyMuPDF pinned ==1.27.2.2; fitz mypy override added.
4 commits: 3021b83 (1.2 Collects) + 9ef1505 (1.2 slug realign to canonical scheme) + 4b56d34 (1.3 Daily Office, 109 tests) + c29f8f3 (1.4 Psalter, 91 tests). +280 tests from 988 to 1249.
commit feb15e3 — 398 feasts + 71 theological subjects imported via `make seed-feasts`. 0.7 DoD target was ≥200 rows; we shipped 398.

pid 20321 running; nav.html fetched successfully after frameset patch (commit fc88e5e). Logs at ~/Library/Logs/bcp_crawler.err.log. Cache at ~/commonplace/cache/bcp_1979/. Expected 8–13hr wall-clock for full corpus (~150–250 pages @ 180s crawl-delay).

commit fc88e5e — extract_links() now also follows <frame>/<iframe> src. Discovered on first launch: bcponline.org is a 1990s frameset site with zero anchors on landing page. +2 tests, 988/988 suite green.

986/986 suite (+32 from Phase 0), ruff clean, make smoke green. 2 parallel commits: 436705a (1.8 embed_text_override seam) + b661364 (1.1 BCP crawler). Pre-existing mypy errors unchanged (12 errors in 7 files, none touched by this wave). Crawler launched as background process writing to ~/commonplace/cache/bcp_1979/ for overnight (8–13hr) first run; subsequent parser iteration runs off cache. Wave 1B (parsers 1.2/1.3/1.4) gates on human checkpoint per plan.

954/954 suite, ruff + mypy clean, make smoke green. 6 commits: bf2a4f0 (plan) → 2ef0e33 (0.1 migration) → 2cb17af (0.2 validator) → 3f206ae (0.4 calendar) → 7e56973 (0.5 subject_freq tool) → 94b0a91 (0.3 import CLI). 111 new tests across Phase 0. Awaiting user seed authoring (0.6/0.7) out-of-band; Phase 1 Wave 1A (1.1 + 1.8) ready to dispatch.
7 new tests, ruff + mypy clean; commit 6b58b0e. Pre-Phase-7 cleanup of prior-session in-progress work.
